title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Touchlight Animal Health (UK) Ltd
body: "Application number 5067  Applicant Touchlight Holdings Ltd objected to the name used by Touchlight Animal Health (UK) Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 24 February 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Touchlight Animal Health (UK) Ltd is changed to 15638739, LTD. "
